policy: Install only the ETHSkills needed for the agent's current task; do not vendor the full catalog by default.

skills.frontend-ux: Wallet/network/signature UX and dApp pre-publish checks.
skills.wallets: Wallet connection, signing, account safety, multisig/account abstraction basics.
skills.l2s: Base/Base Sepolia and L2 deployment/bridging differences.
skills.standards: ERC/EIP references including ERC-20, ERC-8004, EIP-712, EIP-7702.
skills.qa: Independent production QA checklist for dApps.
skills.tools: RPCs, explorers, Foundry, x402, and current Ethereum tooling.
skills.indexing: Events, reads, indexers, and onchain data access patterns.
skills.gas: Current gas/cost mental models and L2 cost tradeoffs.
skills.building-blocks: DeFi primitives such as Uniswap and composable money legos.
